_comment: Sustained reach standoff (#240 phase 2): a stationary Spearmen regiment (reach 48wu) holds ground while an Infantry/sword regiment (reach 26wu) marches up under its own enemy-AI order and locks in melee. Watches whether the spear holds its position (no retreat) and keeps landing hits via its reach advantage and landed-strike knockback, while the sword presses in to close the reach gap and keeps taking losses faster than the spear does.
